name: Creamy Lemon Pie
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
In a medium bowl, beat the egg yolks. Stir in the sweetened condensed milk, lemon juice, and a few drops of yellow food coloring (optional).
Pour the mixture into the prepared crust shell.
Bake for 8 minutes.
Cool thoroughly before chilling.
Top with whipped topping or whipped cream.
Garnish as desired.
